_meta.notes: Full 50-state refresh. All award amounts corrected to exact CMS-confirmed FY2026 figures. Status corrected for 11 states: WI and LA moved active; AL, CA, IL, KY, ME, MI, NY, VA moved to pending. All June–July 2026 sub-grant deadlines updated. 18 new deadline tracker entries added. 8 new rfpOpportunities entries added. Cross-referenced against Up-To-Date Info file, RHT Dashboard, NRHA tracker, and state RHTP pages.

updateHistory.notes: Comprehensive all-50-state refresh: corrected award amounts for all 50 states to exact CMS FY2026 figures; status corrected for 11 states (WI+LA→active; AL/CA/IL/KY/ME/MI/NY/VA→pending); updated all deadlines with dense June–July 2026 sub-grant cluster across OK, IN, MN, TN, VT, MO, KS, AK, SC, AR, FL, WA, LA, CT, DE, GA; added 18 new deadline tracker entries and 8 new rfpOpportunities entries covering MN, AR, FL, IN, LA, WI, VT, OK. Researched all 50 official state RHTP pages, NRHA tracker, rhtp.amemobile.net, SHVS, RHIhub, Up-To-Date Info file, and RHT Dashboard.

states.name: Alabama
states.agency: Alabama Dept of Economic & Community Affairs (ADECA)
states.notes: $203.4M awarded. Sub-grants NOT YET RELEASED as of June 10, 2026. Expected late June 2026. RHTP Advisory Group established to guide implementation. 11 confirmed initiatives: collaborative EHR, rural health access, maternal & fetal health, workforce, cancer digital regionalization, mental health, and more. ADECA leads administration.

states.name: Alaska
states.agency: Alaska Dept of Health
states.deadline: Full application portal open June 1–22, 2026 (closes 9am). Year 2 LOI expected early fall 2026.
states.notes: Year 1 full application portal open June 1–22, 2026 (closes 9am). 403 organizations advanced to implementation pathway. Year 2 LOI expected early fall 2026. All funds must be obligated by December 31, 2026.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Year 1 Full Application — Implementation Pathway
rfpOpportunities.status: Open June 1–22, 2026 (closes 9am June 22)
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: AK's geographic challenge makes virtual care essential — ThinkAndor®'s remote monitoring and virtual rounding are critical for Alaska Native and rural Alaskan hospitals.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Alaska's rural-frontier-tribal care gaps are the exact use case Psynergy was built for. Virtual physicians and APPs serve remote communities that cannot recruit on-site providers.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Multiple RFPs — Children's Mental Health, Healthcare Workforce Retention, Tele-buprenorphine, Physician Rural Residency, Clinical Rotation Expansion, Telehealth Access Points
rfpOpportunities.status: URGENT: Multiple open NOW — June 15–30, 2026 cluster deadlines
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Minnesota's telehealth access points and tele-buprenorphine initiatives are a direct match for ThinkAndor®'s virtual consultation routing and ambient AI documentation capabilities.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Minnesota's workforce retention and rural physician residency initiatives directly match Psynergy's virtual clinical staffing and APP deployment model — high urgency given June deadlines.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: PACT ($93.5M) + RISE AR (workforce) + HEART (prevention) + THRIVE/HOME (RPM/telehealth ~$55.6M)
rfpOpportunities.status: Open now — PACT due July 10; RISE AR due July 24; HEART due July 31
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Arkansas's THRIVE/HOME initiative (~$55.6M, RPM/telehealth) is a direct match for ThinkAndor®'s remote patient monitoring and virtual care capabilities.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Arkansas's RISE AR workforce initiative and PACT program are strong fits for Psynergy's virtual clinical staffing and care coordination services for rural communities.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: RHTP Request for Applications (RFA) — Multiple Initiatives
rfpOpportunities.status: RFA not yet released as of June 10, 2026 — imminent. Webinars: June 16, 22, 23, 25.
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Colorado's technology and value-based care priorities align with ThinkAndor®'s EHR-integrated AI documentation and workflow platform.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Colorado's workforce initiative is a direct fit for Psynergy's virtual clinical staffing model — augmenting rural clinical teams without requiring local hiring.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Perinatal & Pediatric Behavioral Health Teleconsultation (closed June 15) + TN Dept of General Services RFPs (July 6–20) + County Health Council CARE Grants (July 10–Aug 10)
rfpOpportunities.status: First grant closed June 15, 2026. Next RFPs: July 6–20, 2026.
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Tennessee's rural hospital technology and behavioral health teleconsultation focus aligns with ThinkAndor®'s ambient AI documentation and virtual consultation routing.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Psynergy's virtual behavioral health staffing and APP model directly addresses Tennessee's rural workforce gaps — July 6–20 RFPs are next priority window.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Healthy Hometowns — Combat Cancer Health Hub RFP + Maternal Health Hub-and-Spoke RFI + rolling initiatives
rfpOpportunities.status: Open now — multiple rolling opportunities. Combat Cancer Hub + Maternal Health RFI released May 15, 2026.
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Iowa's Combat Cancer Health Hub could use ThinkAndor®'s remote monitoring and predictive analytics for chronic disease management across rural communities.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Iowa's Maternal Health Hub and workforce initiatives are a strong fit for Psynergy's virtual clinical staffing — virtual APPs and care coordination for maternal care.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: ASO Support RFP + Center for Rural Health Sustainability & Innovation (CRHSI) RFP
rfpOpportunities.status: Portal CLOSED June 4, 2026 — award decisions pending. Watch for next round.
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: NM's Rural Health Data Hub and technology initiatives align directly with ThinkAndor®'s AI infrastructure and EHR integration capabilities.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: NM's Healthy Horizons initiative expanding specialty and behavioral health access is a direct match for Psynergy's virtual specialist staffing.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: RFP #26-09RHT-022 — Workforce Stakeholder & PM + Round 2 (Digital Health, Doula, Caregiver)
rfpOpportunities.status: Both rounds SUBMITTED — Round 1 (May 22) and Round 2 (June 8, 2026). Awaiting awards.
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: ThinkAndor®'s ambient AI and virtual care infrastructure is a direct fit for SD's digital health modernization round.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Psynergy's workforce expertise and virtual clinical staffing maps directly to both the workforce PM RFP and the doula/caregiver support round.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Rural Health Innovation Fund — NC ROOTS Hubs + Additional Initiative RFPs
rfpOpportunities.status: ROOTS contracts finalizing June 2026 — next RFPs TBD. Watch NC DHHS page.
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: NC's Rural Innovation Fund prioritizes behavioral health access and technology — ThinkAndor® virtual consultation routing and ambient documentation apply directly.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: NC codified behavioral health access as a key RHTP pillar. Psynergy's virtual behavioral health provider staffing addresses the specific gaps NC's law targets.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Multiple RFPs via WEBS — Hospital Innovation, Tribal Health, Disease Prevention
rfpOpportunities.status: Active now on WEBS — June 17, 2026 deadline (registration required at fortress.wa.gov/ga/webs)
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: WA's hospital innovation and technology initiatives align directly with ThinkAndor®'s deployed capabilities. Prior rural health system deployments provide proof of concept.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: WA's Tribal health and workforce initiatives are a natural fit for Psynergy's flexible virtual staffing — particularly for tribal facilities lacking on-site specialty staff.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Multiple RFPs — Workforce, Technology, Rural Hospital Support
rfpOpportunities.status: Initial round CLOSED May 15, 2026. New rounds expected — watch WV DHHR portal.
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: WV's rural Appalachian network faces extreme staffing shortfalls — ThinkAndor® virtual nursing and ambient AI are purpose-built for this.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: WV is among the most acute rural workforce shortage states. Psynergy's virtual physician/APP model directly addresses WV's documented clinical capacity gaps.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Competitive Bidding (bids.mt.gov) + Provider Grants (ruralhealth.mt.gov)
rfpOpportunities.status: Partner contracts awarded April–June 2026. Stakeholder Advisory Committee August 6, 2026. Next procurement cycle TBD.
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Montana's technology innovation and community health initiatives align with ThinkAndor®'s rural hospital virtual care platform and ambient documentation tools.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Montana's workforce development and sustainable access initiatives match Psynergy's virtual clinical staffing — particularly for frontier communities with extreme provider shortages.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Rural Texas Strong — Technology, Workforce & Patient Portal Initiative
rfpOpportunities.status: NOT YET RELEASED — procurements being staged. Budget Period 1 approved April 7, 2026. Monitor HHSC Grants Page.
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Texas's technology and remote monitoring initiatives are a direct match for ThinkAndor®'s patient engagement and ambient care capabilities at scale.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Texas has the largest rural population in the nation — Psynergy's virtual physician/APP model is purpose-built for the scale and geographic spread of Texas rural health.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Rural Health Innovation & Technology (RHIT) Grant + Non-Compete Continuation
rfpOpportunities.status: Main rounds CLOSED (Flex Fund April 30, Tribal May 29). Non-Compete Continuation (NCC) due August 30, 2026.
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: ThinkAndor® is purpose-built for RHIT criteria: AI, remote monitoring, rural telehealth, and tech-enabled care delivery. Strong KLAS and Frost & Sullivan validation.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Psynergy's virtual workforce and AI-enabled triage services directly address rural technology and workforce capacity — NCC round is the next opportunity.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: RHTP 2026: Technology, Prevention & Workforce Capacity RFA — Next Round
rfpOpportunities.status: Early RFAs CLOSED (Jan–Apr 2026). Next round expected Q3 2026 — watch NJ DOH page.
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: NJ's explicit 'Advancing Technology' focus directly matches ThinkAndor®. NJ published a Vendor Resource Directory — Andor should seek listing.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: NJ's workforce capacity track is a fit, though NJ has less extreme rural workforce shortages than other states.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Multiple Initiative RFPs — Workforce, Technology, Chronic Disease, EMS, School-Based Health
rfpOpportunities.status: SUBMITTED June 15, 2026. Additional rolling RFPs (EMS, School-Based Health, OH SEE, Innovation Hubs) incoming.
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Ohio's chronic disease and technology priorities align with ThinkAndor®'s remote monitoring and predictive analytics for rural population health.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Ohio's workforce and chronic disease initiatives benefit from Psynergy's virtual clinical team model — especially remote monitoring for high-burden chronic conditions.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Catalyst Awards RFGP — Award Decisions July 2026
rfpOpportunities.status: Catalyst Awards RFGP CLOSED May 26, 2026. Award decisions anticipated July 2026. Additional opportunities expected summer 2026.
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Oregon's technology innovation and access priorities align with ThinkAndor®'s virtual care and ambient AI capabilities for rural facilities.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Oregon's rural workforce shortage and specialty access gaps match Psynergy's virtual staffing model exactly.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: AHCA Rural Health Transformation — Grant Opportunities (Released June 10, 2026)
rfpOpportunities.status: Open NOW — RELEASED June 10, 2026 via MyFloridaMarketPlace
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Florida's technology and telehealth priorities directly align with ThinkAndor®'s virtual care platform and ambient AI documentation capabilities.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Florida has extensive rural provider shortages — Psynergy's virtual physician/APP model addresses the workforce gaps Florida's program targets.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: GROW Regional Grants ($120M) + MOCC Operations + Preceptor Registry + ACO Feasibility Study
rfpOpportunities.status: Multiple open — MOCC/Preceptor due June 15; GROW Regional due July 1; ACO due July 6
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Indiana's GROW program technology innovation and ACO development tracks directly align with ThinkAndor®'s EHR-integrated AI and value-based care enablement.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Indiana's GROW workforce grants and MOCC (Medical Operations Care Coordination) initiatives are a direct fit for Psynergy's virtual clinical team and care coordination model.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Louisiana RHTP Sub-Grant Opportunities (Released — June 25 Deadline)
rfpOpportunities.status: Open NOW — June 25, 2026 deadline
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Louisiana's rural hospital support and workforce initiatives have moderate alignment with ThinkAndor®'s ambient AI — monitoring and chronic disease management applications.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Louisiana's rural workforce development and hospital support priorities are a strong fit for Psynergy's virtual clinical staffing model serving rural and underserved facilities.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Wisconsin RHTP Sub-Grant Opportunities (Released May 20, 2026)
rfpOpportunities.status: Open — RELEASED May 20, 2026. Applications open at WI DHS portal.
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Wisconsin's technology innovation and rural hospital support initiatives align with ThinkAndor®'s ambient AI documentation and virtual nursing capabilities.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Wisconsin's rural workforce shortages and hospital support initiatives match Psynergy's virtual clinical staffing model for rural facilities.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: HRIS RFP (June 17) + Blueprint Workforce/Training (June 22) + RPM Technology NOFO
rfpOpportunities.status: HRIS due June 17, 2026; Blueprint due June 22, 2026 — apply via Vermont Business Registry
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Vermont's HRIS and RPM Technology NOFOs are a direct match for ThinkAndor®'s health IT integration and remote patient monitoring capabilities.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Vermont's Blueprint Workforce initiative has moderate fit for Psynergy — smaller rural population but genuine workforce development needs in primary care.

rfpOpportunities.rfp: Chronic Disease Management ($15M) + Rural Regional Reorientation (RRR) — Both Submitted
rfpOpportunities.status: Both rounds SUBMITTED June 8 and June 12, 2026. Watch for award decisions and next NOFOs.
rfpOpportunities.andorNote: Oklahoma's Chronic Disease Management initiative has moderate alignment with ThinkAndor®'s remote monitoring and predictive analytics for rural populations.
rfpOpportunities.psynergyNote: Oklahoma's Rural Regional Reorientation (RRR) program directly targets workforce restructuring — a strong match for Psynergy's virtual clinical staffing model.
